description: LibreChat is represented as a multi-provider chat application that can connect to OpenAI-compatible or local runtimes serving Qwen2.5 models.

sources.title: LibreChat GitHub repository
sources.quote: - 🤖 **AI Model Selection**: - Anthropic (Claude), AWS Bedrock, OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Google, Vertex AI, OpenAI Responses API (incl. Azure) - Custom Endpoints: Use any OpenAI-compatible API with LibreChat, no proxy required - Compatible with Local & Remote AI Providers: - Ollama, groq, Cohere, Mistral AI, Apple MLX, koboldcpp, together.ai, - OpenRouter, Helicone, Perplexity, ShuttleAI, Deepseek, Qwen, and more

description: LibreChat is represented as compatible with OpenAI-style gateway and model-routing runtimes.
